summary:
SPIRITUAL REVIVAL AND MOVIE THEATERS: Brandon shares a prophetic vision concerning a major spiritual awakening and revival coming to America and the world. He specifies that movie theaters will become unexpected venues for a massive outpouring of the Holy Spirit, particularly triggered by the release of Mel Gibson's upcoming film, The Passion of the Christ 2. Brandon envisions believers stationed at these theaters to minister to attendees who will be moved to tears and in need of salvation, emphasizing that this upcoming harvest of souls will happen outside the traditional four walls of the church.

GLOBAL CONFLICT AND GEOPOLITICS: Brandon warns of a severe escalation leading into World War III, highlighting North Korea's deployment of thirty thousand troops to assist Russia in the Ukraine war. He describes a vision of impoverished, untrained North Korean soldiers celebrating their departure on trains, unaware they are being sent to their deaths as front-line fodder. Furthermore, Brandon predicts Russia's ultimate goal to annex all of Ukraine and eventually Poland to rebuild the old Soviet Union. In the Middle East, he anticipates the Abraham Accords progressing alongside a surprise biological attack on Israel, orchestrated by Iran through Syria using mustard gas or similar agents from Damascus. Consequently, Israel will strike Damascus, turning it into a ruinous heap, which will draw the ire of Turkey, Russia, and Iran.

ECONOMIC COLLAPSE AND WEALTH TRANSFER: Brandon details a forthcoming five trillion dollar stimulus bill in the United States, which he views as a temporary adrenaline shot meant to artificially inflate a dying economy. He asserts that the United States dollar is intentionally being destroyed to pave the way for a new digital beast system and a new industrial revolution that will change the world overnight. Amidst this economic collapse, Brandon foresees a massive end-time wealth transfer where the wealth of the wicked is given to the righteous. He specifically mentions praying for Judge Torres and an ongoing SEC lawsuit, predicting that once resolved, certain cryptocurrencies will multiply exponentially, creating overnight decamillionaires among those who remain faithful and attuned to God's voice. Brandon also notes that Jerome Powell's actions are influenced by shadow figures, including former President Obama, to intentionally sink the current financial system.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS AND ANOMALIES: Brandon issues urgent warnings regarding domestic security, cautioning against a sudden, unexpected Pearl Harbor-style attack in the United States. While acknowledging the potential for lone wolf attacks and sympathizer violence around the Fourth of July at malls, theaters, and large gatherings, he emphasizes that the main catastrophic event will happen when the public is least expecting it. He attributes the presence of sleeper cells in ten major American cities to the current administration's open border policies. Additionally, Brandon predicts diverse earthquakes, volcanoes, and false alien invasions, which he clarifies will actually be deceptive demonic manifestations designed to mislead the masses.

POLITICAL LEADERSHIP AND THE END TIMES: Brandon discusses the role of political figures in the biblical end times, stating that Donald Trump is being used by God to unknowingly usher in the final era. He urges intercession for Trump to maintain humility and avoid prideful or retaliatory actions. Addressing speculation about the identity of the Antichrist, Brandon dismisses theories pointing to Trump and instead identifies Muhammad bin Salman as his personal belief for the role. He also touches upon political turbulence involving Elon Musk threatening to create a new political party and facing deportation threats, noting the presence of traitors working inside the White House.

THE CHURCH AND NEW PROPHETIC VOICES: Brandon emphasizes the urgency of the harvest and condemns false prophets and ministers who prioritize building personal financial empires over saving souls. He notes the recent passing of older spiritual generals, such as Jimmy Swaggart, as a divine passing of the baton to a new generation of believers he refers to as the closers. Brandon stresses that every believer, regardless of their role or perceived status, is a vital piece of God's plan, firmly rejecting the concept of competition within the church. He urges the body of Christ to stay attached to the true vine, maintain spiritual discernment, and focus entirely on God's business of the end-time harvest before the season of grace concludes and the tribulation begins.
rawData: [July 03, 2025]-[The Lord showed me lone wolf sympathizers]-[https://youtu.be/tLTlKY5L8O4]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us today. Well, it's been a couple of days since I've made a video. We've had a lot going on: doctor's appointments, dentist, all kinds of things, y'all. And you know, just family stuff, off for the summer, getting all the kids going and doing things. I told Diana today, I said, 'I want to make a video.' And we're driving around like I normally do, praying over the city and praying over the Fourth of July, driving around the malls and everything. And as I was driving around this theater, the Lord kept prompting inside, 'I feel a great awakening that is coming for America. A major revival is coming. A major revival.' And I believe when Mel Gibson releases the movie, The Passion of the Christ 2, this theater is going to be used mightily for a major outpouring of the spirit of the Lord. I'm talking a shaking to awaken is going to awaken America again and around the world. And you know, movies go everywhere, but I know in my heart that God is going to do a major move in the movie theaters because I've seen it. So, another thing that I've warned you all about is North Korea. And I told you in the days ahead that North Korea would really join up with Russia in this war that's taking place. As I'm praying, I have a very intense—it's a big pulse, like, 'Brandon, how do you know?' I feel that stirring to pray. I just know in my spirit this is a hot spot that the Lord is calling me to pray over, and today has been about North Korea joining up with Russia. And I'm telling you, I've seen Russia provoking the situation to try to really take over Ukraine in the days ahead, really trying to flex their muscles, trying to provoke World War III. Do I see that happening as of right now? Yes, a major escalation of things. I've seen it in the spirit concerning Ukraine and Russia. And I warned you about Kim Jong-un bringing troops in. Well, somebody sent me an article saying, 'Hey, Brandon, 30,000 troops are being sent into Ukraine from North Korea to help out with Russia.' Well, that's an act of war by itself with Kim Jong-un doing that. That is a major escalation of 30,000 men going to help Russia out. So, it's already turning into World War III regardless. We have the thing going on that's the peace agreement right now, and they call it the Abraham Accords and all this stuff going on with Israel. And I've warned you all that there's a surprise attack coming from Iran. They will say it's the Houthis, but it's actually Iran involved in this, bringing biological weapons against Israel in the days ahead from Syria out of Damascus, and it will be a major biological attack there. It's like mustard gas. It's something bad in these 50-gallon drums. But with what's going on with North Korea saying, 'We'll bring 30,000,' and Braden will put the article right here—you'll see it, 30,000 troops—they're saying they're going to bring them in. I saw these men on trains being transported from North Korea into Russia on trains, in boxcars. And the boxcar doors were open and they were riding across. And the Lord said, 'They're so excited to get out of North Korea, they don't even realize they're going to their death.' There were literally thousands of North Korean men in train cars being taken from North Korea to Russia for the war. These men were not trained fighters; they looked expendable to me, like they didn't have jobs in offices or whatever. They just looked like people that we would call lower-income people. They were excited to be able to see the world because they've been so oppressed in bondage. And these men were in these train cars, and they were celebrating leaving. And I heard the Lord say, 'But they're going to their death and they don't even know it. You must pray for them.' A lot of these people have never had the opportunity to hear the gospel. And it grieved me because I saw the plan of the enemy to push these men up front so that the other men didn't have to risk their lives. They were like, 'We're going to let them fight. They're not really trained very well, so we'll let these other guys have a break.' So, we see the escalation going on with North Korea and Russia right now. I'm telling you all, I feel caution about Russia and what he's planning behind the scenes with his cards. I told you he has his cards. See, they're trying to outlast Trump. They only have three and a half years left and they know he's gone, right? So we'll just keep on keeping on, taking the land. And that's what I heard him say: 'We want all of Ukraine. We don't want just part of it. We don't want a peace agreement. We want all of what belongs to us, the old Soviet Union.' And the same with Poland. Eventually, it will be Poland. Eventually, it will be these other areas. And they want to bring all that back into Russia, and it will be a stronger Russia. You know, their economy is in trouble. They will bring up the BRICS in the days ahead. So, as we see the big beautiful bill and we see all these things, I've already told you they passed this. They've already seen it's going to get passed. It's going to be a major stimulus check. What you're going to see is the United States economy shooting like an adrenaline shot in the arm. It's going to make everything look like everything is amazing. $5 trillion is going to flood the American economy with this bill, which is just basically inflating a dead horse. I told you the dollar is already done. This seals it even greater for what I've seen coming. They have to get rid of the dollar. And the Lord showed me, he said, 'Trump doesn't even realize to the full extent of how he's being used. He's going to be used on a greater scale to bring in the end times.' So, we see the end times unfolding right in front of our faces, ladies and gentlemen, with this new beautiful bill, big whatever you want to call it, right? That's happening. It's actually being voted on right now as we talk. It's going to pass, right? So when we get this bill passed and they stimulate the economy, I said it will be a new digital platform, a new digital age. A new industrial revolution is coming to America and around the world. A $5 trillion package. I mean, this is huge. $5 trillion. My mind can't even wrap around how much that is; that is a lot of money. But it will make everything for a season look really, really good, and we just tack it on to the debt. So that's happening right now as we speak. So what's about to take place is a great window of opportunity for the wealth of the sinner laid up for the righteous if you just are listening to him and staying in sync with him on a day-to-day basis. This is the time, I told you. I prayed about what happens going into the fourth quarter, praying over the acceleration of the wealth of the wicked laid up for the righteous, going through July, August, September, October, and November, going all the way into the first of the year. The Lord said to me, he said, 'Brandon, you're going to, if you pray.' And then I saw Judge Torres, and the Lord told me, he said, 'Pray for the judge. Pray for this judge, Brandon. This is very serious when it comes to the judge, for this is Satan's wheelhouse and he's trying to block the flow of this certain crypto, trying to block the flow of that. So until the SEC and that lawsuit's done, they're trying to... because I saw once this stuff is stopped and worked out, I saw a doubling and a tripling and a quadrupling of this certain crypto. And the Lord said, 'This will be the beginning of the great wealth transfer.' He said, 'Brandon, I'm going to make decamillionaires overnight.' If you remember what he said, he said, "Brandon, I'm going to make decillionaires overnight." And I thought, "Lord, how are you going to do that?" He said, "If you're listening to me and you're abiding in my word and you're keeping upright with me, I'll show you the secret things." And I believe in the days ahead, the wealth of the sinners is laid up for the righteous. But, you know, it's not just about the Christians getting blessed. This is going to happen to the just and the unjust for what's happening in the days ahead. Ladies and gentlemen, a new industrial revolution is about to take place. A major turn of events. So, do we still have an enemy within? Heavens, yes. Have we caught all these bad guys? No, we have not. We need to continue to pray. The Lord said it will be when you're not expecting it. It's going to be a Pearl Harbor experience. Everybody's expecting the Fourth of July. That's why I've not been like everything's going to be about Fourth of July. I still feel caution. Lone wolf attacks. I want you to hear this. I feel in my spirit we should pray about lone wolf attacks about the Fourth of July. But is this the major thing? No. I'm telling you, the Lord keeps talking to me about a Pearl Harbor experience that will be whenever people are least expecting it, that they'll attack suddenly. So we don't pray what's in the news and what they say, "Oh, we're in elevated risk alert and people should be attentive." Yes, we already know that by the Spirit of God. We're not praying the news. We're praying ahead of the news. We know what's coming before they do. We're the news. Do you understand? We're the news. The prophetic voices in these end times are the news. And that's why God said, "I'm raising up accuracy. I'm raising up men and women that will speak for me with accuracy, not parroting." You know, there's a lot of parrots. There's a lot of people who repeat things because it sounds like it's trendy. And I'm telling you by the Spirit of God, he's raising up people that are not an echo but a voice in these last days that will speak and decree the things of the Lord, warning what's coming because you must know so you're not in harm's way. It's time for the church to become the salt and stand out instead of the world. People are looking at the world. What does Fox say? Who cares what Fox says? What does God say? Let's go to see what the prophets are saying. But people that are not flaky, just parroting things because they heard some other prophet say it versus who got it from the source which is the Father. And the Father comes out and he says, "Brandon, I want you to warn my people that today there's a terrorist attack. I want you to warn my people that tomorrow this is going to happen with finances or whatever." And people said, "Brandon, you said that there was going to be a major crash, a major escalation of oil prices in the days ahead, a crippling of Iran's economy. We have not seen that yet." You are correct. We have not seen $200 a barrel of oil yet. Has that been God's mercy? Did we stop that or is it still coming? And I still feel, ladies and gentlemen, that it's still coming. I still feel there are surprise attacks. When they call peace and safety, then sudden destruction. You have to look at the Word and say, "What part of that word are we at? What is God saying to us?" Are we right now going to see an escalation of things? We see the peace and safety being talked about saying Abraham Accords and we say they're going to do all this stuff and we're going to make peace with Israel and they want a two-state solution and all these things. We know those things have to take place because the Word says that there'll be a Temple Mount. There'll be a new temple built and there'll be all these things happening because that's where the abomination of desolation takes place. And I've warned you about all these things. This is what the Word of God says is going to take place and it will take place. We're not going to alter that. We will not stop the Word of God from taking place through prayer. "Well, you know, we'll pray it away." No, we're not. "We're going to delay it." No, we're not. The Word of God stands alone and it's a pillar and it always is what we go by regardless of what we think we get in prayer. If it goes against the Word of God, it's not the Holy Ghost. The Holy Word always stands alone. And it says, "This is what you go by." Period. It's the anchor. Do you understand? So, we don't go, "Well, we're going to change tribulation. We're going to change the end times through prayer." No. If the Bible said it's going to happen, you can take it to the bank. It's going to happen. Period. There's going to be an end times. We're going to see a beast system. We're going to see the Antichrist rise up. We're going to see all these things. And the Bible says to look at the fig tree. The Bible warns us to watch the fig tree, and the fig tree is Israel. And so that's what we're doing right now. We're seeing it. A peace accord. The Abraham Peace Accords. And Syria wants to be involved. But I'm telling you, the Bible also says that Damascus will be a ruinous heap. And I've seen why. A major attack from Israel will hit Damascus in the days ahead to the point where it will destroy them. It will be so bad. And you'll see Turkey come alongside and say, "Listen, you shouldn't have done that." And Turkey's going to be upset. I saw men marching in. I saw Iran involved. I saw Russia involved. I saw all these major nations involved coming against Israel. Where was America? And I told everybody—people said, "Well, Brandon, where's America at?"—I heard a great betrayal. So, is that after Trump's presidency? Where's Trump at whenever this happens? I don't know. I see in part, I hear in part, but it's all warnings from the Holy Spirit telling us to pray. But right now, it's like this. I see what's coming to the theaters. That's why I'm here. Mel Gibson is making a movie right now, and this is part of this prayer assignment. "Brandon, I want to pour out my spirit in a major way upon the nations like I've never done before. You're going to see healings and demonstrations and manifestations." I feel the presence of the Lord just as I'm saying this. It's time to get your heart right. Jesus is coming. Do I have an urgency? Yes. If you don't see people in ministry leading people to Christ right now, run. Do not listen to ministers that are not leading people to Christ and have urgency to give altar calls because they're not hearing God. You know why? Because God's heart is souls. I want you to hear me. If you are listening to ministers that never give altar calls, if you're listening to people that never talk about the baptism of the Holy Ghost and speaking with tongues talking about a major revival, healings, demonstrations, manifestations of the glory, God's heart is the harvest. Run. Do not listen to them. They're false prophets. If they're not giving altar calls, if they're not telling you Jesus Christ is coming, and you need to repent and turn from your wicked ways, I'm telling you, it's time to get right and straight up with Jesus because we're running out of time. As we watch the fig tree, as we watch all these things, people are all freaked out about America. These sleeper cells of people, I told you, ten major cities, they're in our country right now. Thanks, Joe Biden, because they left open borders. But we're going to see earthquakes in diverse places. We're going to see volcanoes. We're going to see fearful sights in the heavens. And the Lord said, "I'm going to show you more about that." That was about the false alien invasions. False alien invasions are coming. And people are going, "Well, Brandon, do you really think that it's not aliens? This isn't ET. This is demonic spirits. This is the fallen angel, demonic stuff. This is what we're about to see, but it's there to deceive many. The Lord told me, "Brandon, many people will be deceived about what they're about to see." Many people—and I'm not going to be one of them, and I pray you won't either because I'm warning you ahead of time what's coming. I know I've got a lot of sharp people that watch this channel. There are a lot of strong, Bible-believing Christians, so I'm excited you're here. You know, I'm not talking to all the babies. Braden did a poll on that last livestream, and there was only five percent that were unsaved. You know, five percent, that's pretty good. But at least we're getting the unsaved coming and watching because they're curious, and we want them to be curious about what's coming because everybody knows there's something happening. It's like you can sense it in the air. What is going on? So, we encourage you to be encouraged today, to have fun for the Fourth of July. Keep your antennas up. If you're in America, keep your antennas up around the world. It's not just about America. A great shaking to awaken is coming. A major shaking is coming to the world. We see the financial stuff happening with Trump right now, and this is part of the good part. He said, "Days of fun have just begun. It's time to get excited about what I'm about to do in this last outpouring, a major harvest of souls. But the jet fuel is the finances, and then the rocket will take off. You will see it." This is the end-time wealth transfer, I believe, with this big, beautiful bill and all this stuff that they're doing right now. And then you're seeing the crypto being laid. You'll see Jerome Powell and all this stuff. They're saying they want to remove him immediately, which is probably a wise decision since I've seen him with Obama and I've seen him with these suits on, and he's being influenced by them. That's why he hasn't lowered interest rates, trying to do things. Like I said, the ship is already sinking, folks. It's on purpose. They don't even realize it. Why? Because they have to bring in a beast system. That's what's coming, and the dollar is too in the way. The new digital thing of what's about to happen will be the beast system in the days ahead. A new industrial revolution, trying to change everything from the way we do it right now, will change like that. And the Lord told me within a 24-hour period everything you know will change overnight. That is what he told me, and he warned me and told us, "You need to be prepared." A major plague is planned. COVID was a test run. So, I know I repeat this stuff over and over again and I say these things, but I think it's good because you need to hear it. Just because it's inside of me and I know what the Holy Spirit's warning me doesn't mean that you do. So, I feel like it's good, Diana, and I see new faces. There are thousands of new faces, and welcome—I'm so glad you're here. It's exciting. Our channel has grown almost 10,000 people in the last couple of weeks. Braden tried to keep up with all that, but it's amazing what the Lord has done bringing all these new people, especially the South Korea channel. It's really growing, isn't it? And China. So, we give all the glory to God for that. But what I'm anticipating the most right now is the sweet fragrance of the Holy Spirit. So, we see that Jimmy Swaggart went home yesterday, and we send our love to the family. We know he's in a better place. It's going to be amazing. We're excited for him. He just got promoted. You know, we love his song, "It's Beginning to Rain." I told Dina, whenever they announced his passing, I said, "Oh, it's beginning to rain, rain, rain." You know, he's singing in heaven. Oh my gosh, I can't wait. He has a glorified body and a glorified voice. It's exciting, folks. The Lord already told us we would see major generals start to go home, a passing of the baton. You need to remember this. Major generals are going to start to go home in the days ahead that you thought, "Wow." But the Lord told me, "Brandon, nobody lives forever. That man was 90 years old." The other people are getting old, too. They're in their 80s and 90s. Folks, it's the cycle of life. That's what happens. But the Lord told me, "As these people go home, I'm raising up new voices. I'm raising up new generals. Will you take the baton and run with it? Will you be a mouthpiece in these last days? Because they had their time; now it's time for my new voices, and I'm going to raise up new." And you'll see their influence fade away—not that their ministries are dying, but the Lord told me, "It's time for them to rest. It's promotion. They've done their part." And as they've preached the gospel all throughout the late '80s and '90s and '70s or whatever, you see their voice and their influence fading back because it's their season to go home. It's not that God's mad; it's just their season. It's time. They give their impartations, pass on the torch, and go home. And then God raises up new voices that are young and not tired. He says, "Listen, Brandon, it's time for you to run. It's time for you to run, Diana. It's time for you to run, whoever." And that's what we're seeing right now: a new generation. And he said, "Brandon, these are my closers. You all are my closers. You're closing this thing up." Do you understand? He's bringing in the pitching. It's like that verse says: "Run with perseverance the race marked out for us, fixing our eyes on Jesus, the pioneer and perfecter of our faith." And that's Hebrews 12:1. I like that. Run with perseverance, run with great excitement. It's not saying, "Well, the old people are just old and we don't need them anymore." No, we honor them as they head out. They're the ones that carried the baton all those years. Now God's raising up new voices. And he told us, "These are my closers. This generation right here will not taste death because there will be a generation that will not taste death, Brandon." And we are that generation. We are the closers. He said, "I saved the best for last." Nothing against them, but he said, "I saved the best for last. Brandon, I'm telling you, it's time to rise up with a backbone like a crowbar and take my gospel throughout the whole world because the end is coming." We're there. The season of grace is coming to an end. We're getting ready to head into the Tribulation. And so, you know what? It's not about competition—who's the best, who's not. It's just about staying the course and doing what God's called you to do. Whether you're the janitor or on the platform preaching to millions, you're all vital. We're all a piece of the puzzle. There's no competition. That's why I say this Christian competition stuff is crap. Do you understand? People don't like me when I use that word, but all pieces of the orchestra make a beautiful sound. Regardless of whether you are speaking on a platform or if you're just a parking lot attendant, you're all beautiful in the sight of God, fitting the puzzle piece of what you're called to do. Yes. And He's raising up warriors in these last days. He said, "Well, my piece isn't very... I just run the coffee shop at the church." You're important. Do you understand? Every single person is vital in the kingdom of God. "Well, I don't believe that." Well, you don't know God then, because I'm telling you, the little old lady that's praying in the background, you're going to see her have the biggest house in heaven, and the guy that was on the huge platform, you're going to go... because He said the last will be first and the first will be last. Remember that. And I said, "What seeds did you sow in the little, and whenever you're not being noticed, whenever you didn't realize that you were being a light? You were being a light." "Well, I just cleaned the bathroom today, and I made sure there was no spot on there, and I helped the janitor pick up the trash around the church." "Well, there was somebody, and I helped them do this or whatever. I worked in the nursery." You are vital to the kingdom of God, every single one of you. It's so important for you to know this, and it's all hands on deck right now. We need every single one of you. And it's exciting to be a part of it, isn't it, babe? Yes, yes. He's coming so soon. When the theaters happen and the revival starts to happen at this theater, who's going to be there? And they're paying for a ticket because the pastors don't have time to sit in there to say, "Hey, listen. I got tracts to help you." These people are going to need, when that major revival breaks out in the theater with Mel Gibson's new movie—I'm telling you, it's coming—who's going to be there stationed at the theater to say, "Hey, listen. I'm a believer. I'll pray for you"? Because there'll be people probably weeping in the crowd going, "I need Jesus." And you're like, "Let me teach you. Let me help you." Who's going to be stationed at a movie theater? Not being pushy about it, but just being that person there that's being led by the Spirit of God. Not in there Bible thumping people and hitting them, "You've got to get saved. You're going to hell," preaching at the front. No, the film is going to do the work. You're just going to help bring them in with the net. The harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. And God's going to use stuff like this. It won't be in the four walls of a church as much as you think it will, ladies and gentlemen. And He told me, "The first popcorn kernels are popping. Get ready. Get ready. Shock and awe is coming. Shock and awe is coming." And I'm just like, "Oh, I'm anticipating." But first, you're going to start to see the first blades of the financial harvest, and you're going to see this turnaround. And it will be on 1% of the people of the body of Christ—one, because a lot of people won't be able to handle it, and they ain't listening. You're not listening. So, what will you do with your percentage? What will you do with the percentage? Because He said, "I'm making decamillionaires." So, I'm excited about it. I anticipate, I pray I'm part of it. Not saying, "Well, I'm already qualified because I'm Brandon." Who cares? You've got to stay humble. Keep your heart right before Him and say, "Listen, search me and know me, Lord. If there's something that's off inside of me..." It doesn't mean just because I have a platform and speak to how many people a week, it doesn't mean nothing. It's always keeping yourself in check and saying, "Father, I keep my heart right before You," doing exactly what You've called me to do when You've called me to do it. Not going, "Well, you know, I'm already qualified." Woe to you that is that arrogant. "Well, I've got a church of 10,000. I'm qualified." You better check yourself. Keep yourself right before the Father, a vessel that He can use at all times by keeping yourself... "I'm staying with you, Father. Regardless of if you tell me to do... I'm staying with you." He equips the called, but you don't qualify yourself. I'm not worried about everything right now. So, Diana and I just wanted to come on and tell y'all we love you. We're thinking about you. Like I said, we've had some things we've had to do, praying over this nation, praying for the world. And what's happening, we're right in that right now of a major thing that is about to... another thing is about to happen, another birthing pain. The birthing pains are coming on each other, and we're seeing them happening all the time. We're seeing the birthing pains, and it's not time to let our guard down. Well, what's happening with Israel? The big beautiful bill is passing right now. It's part of the birthing pains. It's part of this. Watch what takes place with this. It's part of the birthing pains. We see the big beautiful bill. We see these things happen to Elon Musk. He said he's going to deport Elon Musk and all that. He said if he keeps talking all this stuff, and Elon Musk... "We're going to cause another political party in America, and I'm going to make sure that nobody gets in there that passes this," and all these things that he's saying. He's like, "Well, I'm going to look into deporting him back to South Africa or wherever he was from." And I'm just like, I told you that this thing... people go, "Oh, this was just an act." It's not just an act. There's a rat in the White House. There was a rat in the White House, and there were three more. And you see things happening. And I'm not saying I always defend President Trump on every decision he makes, but I pray for him. He needs our prayer more now than ever before.
